programme.desc: Fluffy battles the wings of death and discusses his outlandish food adventures, iconic wrestling catchphrases and the keys to getting out of a speeding ticket. Don't be surprised when the scorching sauces bring some other characters out to play.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Charlie Day Learns to Love Ridiculously Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Through the emotional highs and lows of Zombie Apocalypse and Mad Dog 357, the "It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia" star weighs in on everything from Zac Efron's neighborliness to the most iconic regional foods of Rhode Island. Kitten mittens!

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Superfan Brett Baker Grills Sean Evans Over Spicy Wings
programme.desc: You know him from his weekly "Hot Ones" Power Rankings on Twitter as well as the time he was serenaded by Russell Brand. Brett is turning the tables on Sean Evans, taking over the hosting seat and making SEAN answer some hot questions for once.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: J Balvin Meets the Devil While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Global icon J Balvin eats the spiciest meal of his life with Sean Evans and discusses everything from late nights in Paris with Michael Jordan to how he almost ended up with the stage name Scotch Bonnet.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: David Blaine Does Magic While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: David Blaine is known all over the world for his street magic and endurance stunts, which include being buried alive for seven days and holding his breath underwater for 17 minutes, but how is he with spicy food?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Dustin Poirier Is Paid in Full While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Dustin "The Diamond" Poirier takes on one of his toughest opponents yet: the wings of death! How do our sauces stack up to Poirier's very own hot sauce, Poirier's Louisiana Style?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Wiz Khalifa Gets Smoked Out By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: O.G. smoker Wiz Khalifa tries to avoid blowing his high on the wings of death. As he and Sean Evans crank up the heat, Wiz breaks down his weed Olympics with Snoop Dogg and discusses his love for the Diplomats.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: DJ Snake Reveals His Human Side While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: You might not recognize DJ Snake walking down the street, but once you hear his discography, the lights go.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Andrew Callaghan Goes for the Marrow While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Andrew Callaghan is a journalist you know best from his work on Channel 5 News, which ranges from gonzo profiles of Florida Man folk heroes to boots-on-the-ground field pieces in war-torn Ukraine.

programme.title: Sisters Compete For Boy's Love
programme.desc: Carter uses sweet, nerdy Tara to make his crush, Sara, jealous. When Sara's cruel nature is revealed, Carter realizes his mistake, choosing Tara's genuine kindness. He publicly rejects Sara, embracing authenticity and a heartfelt Valentine's Day with Tara.

programme.title: Girls Compete For Billionaire Boy
programme.desc: Ryan, pressured by his family's legacy, is forced into a superficial engagement. When his grandfather's health declines, Ryan confronts his fears and chooses to follow his heart, confessing his love for his best friend Darcy.

programme.title: Heartthrob Caught Cheating On Livestream
programme.desc: Riley, a beauty influencer, fakes a glamorous life to gain followers, hiding her true self and low-income reality. After a public meltdown exposes her lies, she embraces authenticity, finding true love and a renewed career built on vulnerability.

programme.title: Popular Girl Has Secret Crush On Nerd
programme.desc: Bentley, a high school heartbreaker, makes a bet to win over Rose, enlisting her friend Reggie's help. Reggie's growing feelings for Rose and Bentley's deceit lead to a prom-night confrontation, exposing truths and revealing true connections.

programme.title: Girl Becomes Fake Wife For 180 Days
programme.desc: A talented but poor artist, Clarice, and Ken, a rich architect, fake a marriage for Ken's career. Lies unravel, but they learn true success comes from their own merit and mutual support, leading them to pursue their dreams together.

programme.title: Girl Fakes Rich To Marry Billionaire
programme.desc: Lily, forced to find a rich husband for her family's debt, fakes a relationship with Jack, who's also pushed into it. Their fake bond blossoms into real love, leading them to overcome lies and build a life together.

programme.title: Billionaire Falls In Love With Poor Girl

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S2:E6 Lush Lunches - Tom believes that we all deserve a proper lunch and he's not talking about soggy sandwiches and a packet of crisps. In this episode Tom shows us some great recipes for livening up your lunches and making them proper lush.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S3:E1 Christmas Dinner - This is Christmas dinner Tom Kerridge style with everything pushed that little bit further to make it a real celebration feast. Tom likes to keep it traditional at Christmas and always cooks Turkey. But this is Turkey with a twist as he's not roasting it, he's rolling it.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E1 Food for Friends - This episode features dishes that are perfect for serving up to groups of friends. This is hearty, casual cooking meant for sharing that means less time fussing in the kitchen and more time spent tucking in to great food with your mates.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E2 Outdoor Food - We all enjoy eating outdoors in a Great British beer garden and in this episode Tom wants to show us how to do outdoor food properly. He believes we should give our outdoor cooking the same love and attention you would when cooking in your kitchen and that's exactly what he does.

programme.title: Birth Days
programme.desc: S1:E25 Sarah and Jeff - She's a radio announcer. He's an engineer. And when they met online, Sarah and Jeff were immediately attracted to one another. So much so that three months later Sarah was pregnant with their first child. Little more than strangers, they risked it all and married.

programme.title: Birth Days
programme.desc: S1:E26 Krysha and Lanny - Krysha knew Lanny was the one for her the first time she laid eyes on him at the mall. She was working the popcorn stand when Lanny came around the corner. They chatted at the bustop and after three dates they moved in together.

programme.title: Birth Days
programme.desc: S3:E1 Isocrates and Laura - Totally committed to one another and to their growing family, Isocrates and Laura never get a quiet moment to themselves. On a tight budget and living in grandma's basement, the couple's schedule is unrelenting…

programme.title: Birth Days
programme.desc: S3:E2 Angela and Wendell - As a long-haul trucker, Wendell spends five straight days a week on the road. Angela, on the other hand, is busy at home riding solo with their three kids. Although there's a car in the driveway, Angela doesn't have her license and is stuck...

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E5 The Coopers - Struggling to make ends meet since her divorce, single mom Jackie is desperate to sell her three-bedroom detached home in historic Dunstable. But after two years, 37 viewings, and two failed offers, the home's value has dropped, and now the market's in a slump.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E6 The Andrews - Retired empty nesters, Betty and Ron, are longing to sell their three-bedroom, end-of-terrace home in southeast London to move closer to family. But after 16 months on the market and over ninety viewings (Betty has handled them all herself), the disheartened couple is running out of steam.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E7 Ms. Kemal - Diane is so desperate to sell her 200-year-old, four-bedroom home in Ingrave, Essex, that it's listed the property with three agents… But after numerous viewings in two years, and despite an £80,000 price cut, she's still there, and her bills keep piling up.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E8 The Bryants - John and Anne are splitting up, and want to sell their 100-year-old, four-bedroom, semi-detached Edwardian home in Finchley, North London… But even after dropping the price £65,000, they've had just eight viewings in four months, and not a single offer.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: S4:E1 License to Grill - Paul takes a trip with his kids to visit Mark, Rhea and the kids in Los Angeles. A simple family BBQ turns into a battle of Wahlberg clans during a game of touch football.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: S4:E2 Do the Hustle - As part of the ever expanding Wahlberg empire, Mark searches for new ventures. But when members of his entourage attempt to pitch their own ideas, tempers flare and Mark is caught in the middle.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Chris Lambrianou, a former London gangster who worked for the Kray Twins in the 1960s, reveals details about the notorious Ronnie and Reggie, and opens up on his involvement in the murder that led to their eventual downfall.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode, we spoke to intrepid explorer Benedict Allen who has nearly died nine times throughout his career - including when he was threatened by gold miners, contracted deadly malaria and was shot at by Pablo Escobar's hitmen. Benedict relives his experience of becoming the first person to cross the Amazon Basin and getting lost alone in the rainforest for weeks without food, shelter or water. This desperate situation led him to make one of the toughest decisions of his life and moulded him into the explorer we meet today.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Ed reveals the most extreme thing he's done to survive, the most disgusting things he's eaten, and his most dangerous moments walking the Amazon. He also gives great survival tips and tells you why he would never drink Thames water!

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Actor Adam Pearson grew up with a genetic condition called neurofibromatosis, which causes the growth of tumours on nerve tissues on his face and upper body. Today, he tells us about his youth, coping with bullying and his successful acting career.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Roshaante Andersen was was born with a vagina and internal testicles. He did not find out he was intersex until he was 11 years old. In this interview he takes us through growing up as intersex, and why he chose to live as a man.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former Harry Potter stuntman David Holmes discusses the on-set accident that left him paralysed, his close friendship with Daniel Radcliffe, outdated attitudes towards those with disabilities and how all people can be a force for positive change.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sat down with Amelia Dimoldenberg, who is behind the hit YouTube show 'Chicken Shop Date' and talked about how she started the show, her favourite dates, and the one dream date she's after...

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth and Anya Taylor-Joy settle the biggest debates on the web, weighing up whether the Australian accent is the sexiest and if they could land a plane in an emergency before enjoying a hilarious debate about time travel.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Timothée Chalamet and Austin Butler pit US and UK foods against each other to see who takes the ultimate title of reigning snack champion. The pair has a great time being introduced to British classics, and cause carnage trying a royal favourite! Millie Bobby Brown tackles meals from the UK and the US, including carrot cake, liquorice allsorts and energy drinks. The Stranger Things star compares Bovril to a Starbucks vanilla latte, and faces her biggest food gripe: quinoa.

programme.title: Swipe Stuff
programme.desc: Lily James takes on LADbible's Swipe Stuff, where celebrities swipe yes or no on everything from pop culture to guilty pleasures. From Sabrina Carpenter to UGGs and Mamma Mia 3 to TOWIE, she's sharing her opinion and she doesn't hold back!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Shaboozey joins us to compare British and American snacks! He falls in love with Maltesers, spits out Milk Duds, explains why the PB&J is the ultimate staple of American cuisine, and finishes it all off with a double shot of whiskey.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chris Pratt and Millie Bobby Brown settle some of pop culture's biggest debates, arguing over the length of award season speeches and who would last longer in a zombie apocalypse, and Millie reveals who her go-to celebrity impression is!

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds and Will Ferrell put their friendship to the test as we learn about some of Will's amazing pranks, Ryan reveals how he got kicked out of school and we find out whether Ryan can remember the colour of Will's eyes! Fast X stars Charlize Theron, Brie Larson and Michelle Rodríguez put their friendship to the test as we learn how Brie escaped from the police at a house party and which famous rapper nearly threw up on Michelle when she took them stunt driving!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Tennis player Naomi Osaka joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK v Japan. The four-time Grand Slam winner and former world number 1 tries Greggs sausage rolls, sushi, Jaffa Cakes, matcha ice cream, scotch eggs and dorayaki! Ahead of the Hungarian Grand Prix, Formula 1 Driver Alex Albon joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK vs Thailand on SPORTbible. The Williams Racing star samples curry, cornish pasties, Party Rings, pickled onions, crisps, chips, and more.

programme.title: WOULD YOU RATHER?
programme.desc: The Avatar cast, Sigourney Weaver, Zoe Saldana, Oona Chaplin, Sam Worthington & Stephen Lang join us for a hilarious game of Would You Rather? Debating telekinesis v telepathy, whether they'd visit the future or the past, and alien battle chances!

programme.title: President of the World
programme.desc: What if Matchroom's Eddie Hearn ran the planet? From banning rude people to bringing dogs into the office and selling out stadiums like Wembley and MSG, the boxing boss lays down the law in his wild fantasy presidency.

programme.title: The Eleven
programme.desc: In this episode, ex-Liverpool star Jamie Redknapp clashes with Man City icon Micah Richards, with Arsenal fan and comedian Romesh Ranganathan overseeing proceedings, to decide on a combined XI of England's top two clubs.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chelsea fan Savage Dan tells Manchester City fan Buvey why he thinks Erling Haaland is overrated. The two argue over some of the biggest debates between the two Premier League sides, including who was better: Drogba or Agüero?

programme.title: BLOCK 'N' SCROLL STAR
programme.desc: England captain and Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane joins us for the ultimate interview! Fans slide into his DMs to ask questions about the Premier League, Tiger Woods, Ed Sheeran, Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo, Ryan Gosling, and the World Cup.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Linda Calvey, also known as Black Widow, is one of the most famous female gangsters in the UK. In this episode, Linda tells us about her life story, crime path and what she thinks of people calling her a Black Widow.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we talk to Kieran Proverbs-Brown, who became a gang member at 14 and was in prison at 18 for attempted murder. When he got out at 30, he made a firm decision to turn his life around.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.desc: Appu, a 10th-grade student, loses interest in studies, believing that poverty limits her future. Despite her mother's efforts, including enrolling her in math tuition, Appu feels destined to follow in her mother's footsteps as a maid, convinced that only rich kids become doctors or engineers. Her dreams seem out of reach due to their financial struggles. However, everything changes when her mother unexpectedly gets a chance to resume her own education. This opportunity inspires hope and shifts Appu's perspective, proving that determination and second chances can break the cycle of limitations and transform lives, regardless of background or class.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The aircraft capable of delivering the payload of a B17, in a single post war air frame. The many variants of this single piston engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air to ground attack role in Vietnam, earning quite a reputation.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The definitive combat helicopter saw first blood in South East Asia and has been transport, gunship, smoke ship, command centre, MediVac and dozens of other roles. We hear and see it's hair raising missions and watch it earn its fame.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Junkers Ju 52, which is considered one of the most famous airplanes in history. It was first designed as an airliner, but was used as a transport, bomber, and air ambulance during the Second World War.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Republic P-47 Thunderbolt, a Second World War fighter aircraft produced by the American company Republic Aviation from 1941 until 1945. It was considered a successful high-altitude fighter and also served as the foremost US fighter-bomber in the ground-attack role.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-3, a Second World War Soviet fighter that was regarded for its performance at low altitudes and its agility. It was one of the most successful Soviet aircraft designs of the war.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Hawker Hurricane was the first RAF aircraft to fly over 300mph. Over half of every enemy aeroplane destroyed in the Battle of Britain was by a Hurricane, not a Spitfire.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II. Regarded as one of the most important aircraft of the Cold War. It was a major part of the United States Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps, and was also used by many other countries.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Physicist Enrico Fermi posited his famous paradox in the early 1950s, asking if intelligent life is so likely to occur in the vastness of the universe, then why hasn't any of it contacted the Earth?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Persistent claims and theories assert that the government's changing explanations and initial acknowledgment of a "flying disc" in the Roswell incident point to a deliberate effort to conceal potentially significant information.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: There are three types of close encounters with aliens, sightings, fleeting interactions, and the third kind where aliens take humans for extended periods. We look at instances of all three and meet real people who have experienced them.

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This popular motif in prehistoric cave paintings, the European Bison is Europe's heaviest land mammal. Weighing in at just under one tonne, it is also Europe's last wild cattle spieces

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: With antlers that can grow up to 2 meters in size and can consume 10kg of grass, young trees and bark a day the Elk is the largest deep spieces in the world. With their habitat the dense, poorly accessible forests and moorlands, we see the coumminities of Elk driven up by climate change.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money. Will Agatha stand up to Drew who has decided to send them away to find money, by insisting the dog stays at the clinic?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Charlotte has growing cynicism towards the owner of the emaciated black dog, when he repeatedly dodges his responsibility. Charlotte and Roxy set out on a house call to investigate. What will they find at the owner's house? What condition are his other dogs in?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.sub-title: Epic Safari Encounters: Bumi Hills Safari Lodge Part 2
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Zambezi Expeditions Camp Part 1
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Red Panda
programme.desc: The Red Panda is undoubtedly one of the most beautiful animals on earth and this is the first ever intimate portrait ever made.

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) – that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face. Their young lives are full of learning, moments of great tenderness and life-threatening drama. Over three years all of our bears, despite hardships and losses along the way, prove they have what it takes, they all have learned their bear essentials.

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

CRZY The title 「TASTE」 carries a dual meaning: sharing the musical “tastes” Haechan has cultivated from his childhood dream of becoming a singer to the present, and inviting listeners to “taste” the very first music he has created as a solo artist. Through this album, fans can fully experience Haechan's world of music. 10. Grey Rain NCT Haechan has released his first solo album 「TASTE」, featuring 11 tracks including the title song *CRZY*. The album highlights Haechan's unique musical color, built around his favorite genre, R&B, and expands into diverse moods of soul, hip-hop, and jazz. 8. WYN? (Feat. HAON)

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug.
