programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter a girl who's determined to catch a Rhyhorn that knows Surf.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Aboard a luxury blimp, two courageous Kecleon face off against Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Nurse Joy who cares for Water types despite disliking them.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Cyndaquil and Meowth visit an oasis after being separated from their friends.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet Olivine City Gym Leader Jasmine, but her Ampharos is sick.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash faces Fighting-type Gym Leader Chuck in a battle at the Cianwood City Gym.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash gets to pick his first Pokémon, but the only one left is a stubborn Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Viridian City, Ash and Pikachu meet Misty and encounter Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash catches his first Pokémon, but Misty dislikes this new Bug-type friend.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Attacked by a swarm of Beedrill, Ash accidentally puts his Metapod in danger.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E19 Amateur Hour - Lolirock is judging an amateur talent show when a nervous contestant named Mark completely bungles his magic act. After Iris' pendant glows, the Princesses realize Mark is a person in need and try to calm his nerves and help him perfect his act.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E20 Strawberry Fields For Never - Auriana, Iris, and Lyna go to a farm to pick strawberries. Ricky, the son of the farm's owner, tells them that unfortunately, the crop has failed this year – and he can't figure out why. The Princesses' magic reveals that whatever is beneath the ground is pure evil.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E21 Stop In The Name of Lev Part I
programme.desc: S2:E21 Stop In The Name of Lev Part I - Lara tells the girls she has set up a concert gig for them. Excited, Iris runs to tell Nathaniel, only to find him staring enraptured into Missy's eyes. Hurt, Iris runs out, right into a battle with the Evil Twins. She drives them off, and finds she has just saved Lev!

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.sub-title: S2:E22 Stop In The Name of Lev Part II
programme.desc: S2:E22 Stop In The Name of Lev Part II - As the vortex starts to close, Talia convinces Iris to wait until Talia contacts her sister Izira, head of the Resistance on Ephedia. But after a moment of confusion, the holographic Izira confirms everything in the King's message: Iris, and only Iris, must return to help the King.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E23 Statue Game - Gramorr sends the Twins two crystal amulets that, used in tandem, can turn an opponent to stone. Meanwhile, Carissa scoffs at soccer, so Iris and Talia take Carissa to watch the Sunny Bay Suns practice.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E24 Forget You! - During a battle with the Princesses, Praxina angrily cast a powerfull spell to blast the princesses. The Princesses conjure a shield that protects them, and Mephisto vanishes – but the impact knocks out Praxina.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E25 Crowning Glory Part I - Izira appears in a hologram with good news: One more gem and they will finaly restore the crown of Ephedia! Carissa and Lyna are with Izira – they've already been called home. And now Iris reveals to Auriana and Talia that Aunt Ellen has secretly been an Ephedian all along.

programme.title: LoliRock
programme.desc: S2:E26 Crowning Glory Part II - Nathaniel brings flowers to Iris... but is crestfallen to see all of Aunt Ellen's moving boxes, Iris told him she was moving, but not so soon ! Iris tells him she wanted to be his girlfriend more than anything, and wants them to enjoy whatever time they still have together.

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land and Sea
programme.desc: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

programme.title: Deadly Voltage
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: (2011) Red-hot action adventure with Rachel Hunter. Can a volcano expert blow the whistle on an illegal oil drilling operation before it sets off a city-destroying super-volcano beneath Miami?

programme.title: Firequake
programme.desc: (2014) Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished?

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Ian McKellen stars in the classic tale of revenge that has stood the test of time, reimagined for the modern day as a psychological thriller.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E. 2 : Mission Impawsible
programme.desc: In this sequel, the super intelligent artificial robotronic dog, Archie, befriends Gregory, a young boy who is the son of a carnival owner. Gregory is concerned that someone has been stealing from the carnival and enlists his new friend to help find the culprit.

programme.title: The Great Ghost Rescue
programme.desc: Young Humphrey is a ghost with a big problem. He and his family, the Craggyfords, have been ousted from their home and left without a place to haunt. As they search for new haunting grounds they soon discover that they are not alone.

programme.title: Puppy Time
programme.desc: Get ready to fall in deep, deep puppy love as we follow a litter of adorable puppies as they play, nap, tumble, eat and play some more. Featuring the worlds cutest and most loved and treasured breeds including Pugs, Labradors, Dachshunds and Pekingese - these furry pups will have you laughing, crying, swooning and barking for more as we watch them discover their new world.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: After a rich Edwardian widow impulsively marries a handsome but poor Tuscan dentist and dies in childbirth, her English in-laws try to gain custody of the baby.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: John Malkovich, Gary Sinise and Sherilyn Fenn shine in this contemporary remake of the beloved classic about a nomadic farm worker who looks after his dimwitted, gentle-giant friend.

programme.title: Bill & Teds Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Flypaper
programme.desc: During a bank robbery, a man decides to protect the pretty teller who he has fallen head over heels for.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Magic Mike
programme.desc: A male stripper teaches a younger performer how to party, pick up women, and make easy money.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A cop is assigned to the neighborhood where he grew up, where an old secret threatens to destroy his family.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: Starring the charming Meghan Markle (Suits), this whirlwind rom-com proves that finding Prince Charming can be a right royal pain. Sassy Mindy is well and truly immersed in the superficial dating scene, while her best friend Laura is a hopeless romantic. So when she has a chance moment with a stranger in a coffee shop, she is left wondering whether this could blossom into a lifelong romance?

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: A brilliantly hilarious "in tents" comedy drama, starring David Arquette, Amy Acker and Academy Award nominee June Squibb. With their marriage on the rocks, Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark". But when their blissful romantic getaway is hijacked by a pair of hipster honeymooners and a hunky land-owner, they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Mr. Jones
programme.desc: A highly-compelling political thriller from award-winning director Agniezka Holland. Welsh journalist Gareth Jones (James Norton: Little Women) risks his life to expose the truth about the devastating famine in the Soviet Union in the early 1930s. Also starring Vanessa Kirby (The Crown) and Golden Globe Nominee Peter Sarsgaard (The Batman). This is the most important true story you will ever see.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge. Starring Martin Kemp (The Krays), Gary Kemp (The World's End), and from the producers of Rise of the Footsoldier and Goodfellas, Assassin is the story of the most corrupt crime bosses in the London underworld, and one man's crusade to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: Unlucky in love Abbey opens her heart in a letter and puts it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out. Starring Bethany Joy Lenz (2019)

programme.title: A Lifelong Love
programme.desc: (2023) Lyrical love story starring Andrea Brooks and Patch May. When poet Annika tries to reunite her grandfather with his first love, will teaming up with an old flame rekindle another romance?

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: (2022) Romcom with Kabby Borders and Tyler Harlow. A journalist goes undercover to expose the truth about a mysterious retreat. But when sparks fly with its owner, will love be the front-page story?

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: Love Off the Page
programme.desc: (2022) Rom-com starring Malone Thomas. A hopeless romantic buys a book from a mysterious store, only to find its stories unfolding in real life. Will it depict her own love story?

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: The Charm of Love
programme.desc: Art historian Madison “Maddie” TURNER, an expert in ancient artifacts and in deflecting unwanted male attention, travels halfway around the world to the Caribbeans in order to find the legendary "Lovers Stone".

programme.title: A Week in Paradise
programme.desc: A film star with a newly broken heart jets off to paradise in the Caribbean, where she finds not only herself again, but maybe even a new love.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles, developing a beautiful friendship amidst original and licensed songs and stunning choreography.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage counselor attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Eat, Drink And Be Married
programme.desc: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

programme.title: Sarah / Ellen / Sherman and Dee Ann
programme.desc: A heavily pregnant woman is viciously attacked.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenager reaches out to her mother who is in prison for a double homicide.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez, the "Night Stalker," was a cruel and prolific serial killer.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Durst's arrest captured headlines, but what about his forgotten first wife Kathie?

programme.title: Running Away
programme.desc: Sisters Maggie and Lizzie move in with mom Peg's new husband. Secrets and lies start immediately. Maggie cannot handle what follows and recruits a friend to help her plan to get out of town with her step father's secrets. When Peg discovers that her daughter has run away, she now has to find Maggie fast but must come to terms with the dark secrets that led to Maggie's fleeing and the secrets about her new husband.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: The journey continues from What Would Jesus Do? (2010) as the drifter arrives into a new town inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: Bespectacled bounty hunter Stan Ross arrives in Canyon City after a bank robbery and uncovers a web of corruption. Hired by banker Jefferson to hunt Mexican bandits, Stan learns the bandits were falsely accused and once worked with Jefferson. As Stan digs deeper, he faces betrayal, hidden alliances, and a dangerous grip on the city.

programme.title: Hellgate
programme.desc: Accused of spying for the Confederacy, a man is sent to the brutal Hellgate Prison. After a failed escape lands him in solitary confinement, his path to redemption begins. When a deadly plague strikes the prison, he faces the ultimate test of character, transforming his dire circumstances into a chance for renewal.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid Returns
programme.desc: Cisco Kid stops Rosita's marriage to Harris, claiming she's his wife and presenting a borrowed child, Nancy, as proof. After Nancy's father is killed, Cisco protects her from schemers Harris and Conway, who want her inheritance. With clever plotting, Cisco and Pancho outwit the villains to ensure Nancy's safety.

programme.title: And Now... Make Your Peace with God
programme.desc: Two men ride toward Denver City, each chasing a ghost from the past—one seeks his father's killer, the other a treacherous friend who stole his gold. Along the way, a silent, deadly gunslinger joins them, his motives unknown. In the shadows of vengeance, alliances shift and secrets unravel.

programme.title: Cut-Throats Nine
programme.desc: A cavalry troop is escorting a wagonload of convicts on their way to prison through the mountains when they are attacked by a bandit gang. Only a sergeant, his beautiful young daughter, and an assortment of seven sadistic, murderous prisoners survive, and they are left without horses or a wagon. The sergeant must find a way to get his prisoners to their destination while protecting his daughter, watching out for the still-pursuing bandits, and trying to determine which prisoner is the man who raped and murdered his wife.

programme.title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog
programme.desc: Silent film based on a Jack the Ripper style serial killer in London.

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Two sailors become suspicious when they meet off the north coast of Germany.

programme.title: The Fast Lady
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Stanley Baxter and Julie Christie.

programme.title: Life Is a Circus
programme.desc: The Crazy Gang have been jacks-of-all-trade with Joe Winter's Monster Circus for almost as long as Joe has been on the road. They are always hoping to be 'discovered', but Joe is fighting a losing battle to keep in business. With his equipment mortgaged, most of his acts have deserted him, and even the elephants have walked out. And so the Crazy Gang set about finding a way to save the circus and come up with a very unusual solution!

programme.title: Brighton Rock
programme.desc: The scene is Brighton, with holidaymakers awaiting the arrival of Kolley Kibber, who is working on a stunt for his newspaper.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major, "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story.

programme.title: 3.5th Period
programme.desc: In Shin-ha High School, there's a secret hidden between the 3rd and 4th periods. It's the existence of a 3.5th period where time flows ten times slower, turning 10 minutes into 100. Baek Ah-jin accidentally enters the 3.5th period and meets Kang Da-won, a male student trapped there. To help Da-won escape from the 3.5th period, Ah-jin unravels the mysteries hidden there. However, there are those who hinder their efforts and strive to conceal the 3.5th period. What secrets are hidden in Shin-ha High School's 3.5th period? Will Da-won successfully escape and reunite with Ah-jin?

programme.title: 26 Years
programme.desc: A gang member, an ex-national shooter, a policeman and a businessman who lost their family members during Gwangju Massacre in 1980 set an assassination plot against the ex-president who responsible, because he never apologise.

programme.title: HITMAN: AGENT JUN
programme.desc: Jun, a former human weapon turned webtoon artist, must protect his peaceful family life amid a massive battle.

programme.title: SWITCH
programme.desc: Top celeb Kang wakes up in a new life: married to first love with twins—while his ex-manager is now the star!

programme.title: SAMJIN COMPANY ENGLISH CLASS
programme.desc: Three female office workers take English classes for promotions and team up to expose company corruption.

programme.title: The Exclusive
programme.desc: Mu-hyuk's false article on a serial killer makes him famous but his cover-up traps him in a web of lies.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: The Wrong Babysitter
programme.desc: A mother must revisit her husband's death in order to rescue her daughter who was kidnapped by her neighbour. Starring Daphne Zuniga (2017)

programme.title: Secrets That Kill
programme.desc: Jenny is unhappy when her mum Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband.

programme.title: Dispatch
programme.desc: (2016) Crime thriller with Fiona Gubelmann. A 911 operator takes a call from a child and dismisses it as a prank. But when a body is discovered, she'll do whatever it takes to make things right...

programme.title: Cheer Squad Secrets
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Anita Brown. After her daughter becomes cheerleading captain, a woman is horrified to find that someone is giving the girl steroids - and will do anything to cover their tracks.

programme.title: Brace For Impact
programme.desc: (2016) Drama with Kerry Condon. A disgraced Flight Crash Investigator uncovers a conspiracy while probing her brother's mysterious plane crash. Can she race to uncover the truth?

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence and Chris Pratt star in an adventure about two passengers traveling to a new planet when their spaceship malfunctions.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Dresser
programme.desc: In this wickedly funny and moving story, Sir reflects on his accomplishments and seeks to reconcile his turbulent friendships with those in his employ before the final curtain.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: Instrument of War
programme.desc: Instrument Of War is an harrowing yet uplifting true story about survival against seemingly impossible odds. When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.
